summary: Story Multiplayer Engine Phase 1 - All 29 backend tests passed (100%). All new endpoints working correctly: chain, branches, battle, increment-metric, backfill-multiplayer. Multiplayer fields present in status response. Battle score formula verified.
critical_code_review_comments: Code review passed - all endpoints properly implemented with correct validation, authentication, and error handling
context_for_next_testing_agent: Story Multiplayer Engine Phase 1 fully tested. All endpoints verified: (1) GET /api/stories/{id}/chain - returns full lineage tree with episodes sorted by depth, branches grouped by parent sorted by battle_score, (2) GET /api/stories/{id}/branches - returns competing branches sorted by battle_score, episodes, and parent story, (3) GET /api/stories/battle/{id} - returns ranked contenders with creator names, user rank, original story marked, (4) POST /api/stories/increment-metric - increments views/shares and refreshes battle_score, (5) POST /api/stories/backfill-multiplayer - admin-only, backfills existing jobs with multiplayer fields, (6) POST /api/stories/continue-episode and continue-branch - require auth, validate parent exists and is completed. Status response includes all multiplayer fields: root_story_id, chain_depth, continuation_type, total_children, total_views, total_shares, battle_score, parent_job_id. Allowed actions for completed stories include continue_episode and continue_branch. Battle score formula verified: continues*5 + shares*3 + views*1 with depth_multiplier=1+(depth*0.2), recency_boost=1/(1+hours*0.05), anti-gaming penalty when continues/views < 0.02 and views > 50.

backend_api_tests.chain_with_valid_story: PASS - returns root_story_id, chain_stats, episodes, branch_map, all_nodes
backend_api_tests.branches_response_structure: PASS - returns parent, branches, episodes, total_branches, total_episodes
backend_api_tests.battle_response_structure: PASS - returns battle_parent_id, current_story, contenders with rank/creator_name/is_original/battle_score
backend_api_tests.increment_views: PASS - increments total_views and refreshes battle_score
backend_api_tests.increment_shares: PASS - increments total_shares and refreshes battle_score
backend_api_tests.backfill_with_admin: PASS - returns success with updated count

features_verified.multiplayer_fields_in_status: root_story_id, chain_depth, continuation_type, total_children, total_views, total_shares, battle_score, parent_job_id
features_verified.allowed_actions_updated: continue_episode and continue_branch for completed stories
features_verified.battle_score_formula: continues*5 + shares*3 + views*1 with depth_multiplier and recency_boost
